---
name: Experiment idea
description: Propose a new experiment for the repo
title: "[Experiment]: "
labels: experiment-idea
assignees: ""
---

## One-line idea

A short name and one-sentence description (e.g. "QR Generator – generate QR codes for a URL at the edge").

## Cloudflare capability

Which Cloudflare feature would this demonstrate? (e.g. Workers AI, Browser Rendering, D1, KV, R2, Queues, Durable Objects, etc.)

## Why it fits this repo

- Small and focused
- Independently deployable
- Useful as a real tool or learning example
- Request path completable in under ~60 seconds (if applicable)

## Rough API or usage

e.g. `GET /qr?url=...` returning a PNG, or `POST /shorten` with body `{ "url": "..." }`.

## Optional: bindings

Any bindings needed? (e.g. AI, D1, R2, Browser Rendering) or fully stateless?

## Additional context

References, similar tools, or implementation notes.
